extDescription.message: Shows repository size next to repo names, warns about inactive repositories, and adds a quick-jump menu to a user's other repositories.

description.message: "repo" 범위를 가진 GitHub 개인 액세스 토큰을 입력하세요.

renderWarning.message: 경고: 이 저장소는 1년 이상 업데이트되지 않았습니다

renderCaution.message: 주의: 이 저장소는 6개월 이상 업데이트되지 않았습니다

confirm.message: 토큰을 입력하지 않았습니다. GitHub 토큰을 지우시겠습니까?

newTab.message: Open in a new tab when quickly viewing repositories

ossinsight.message: OSS Insight analysis page for the repository

activeforks.message: Active forks list for the repository

deleteRepo_i.message: You are trying to delete the repository:

deleteRepo.message:
Deleting a repository is an extremely dangerous operation.
Once you delete a repository, it cannot be recovered.
Please think twice! Data is priceless, cherish it.

deleteRepo_ask.message: Are you sure you want to delete the repository? (Confirmed

deleteRepo_failed.message:
Deletion failed!
It is recommended to check whether the GitHub token has permission to delete the repository!

get_more_repos.message: Quickly jump customize to obtain user repositories

get_more_repos_maxpage.message: Quickly jump the maximum number of pages to obtain the repositories, the default is 1 page (0 means no limit)

get_more_repos_perpage.message: Quickly jump to the repositories below to get the number displayed per page

fixed_head_on_mobile.message: Fixed page navigation bar on mobile devices

refresh_time.message: Enter the refresh time of the local cache (Format 1: 1h30m Format 2: 10h Format 3: 90s etc...)
